_instructions: MCP Server Configuration Template. Copy to your tool's MCP config file and uncomment the servers your project needs. See mcp-configs/README.md for details. Replace ${VAR_NAME} with actual environment variable names. NEVER commit secrets — use env vars instead.

_linear_example._description: Linear issue tracker. Set LINEAR_API_KEY env var. See mcp-configs/project/linear.json

_jira_example._description: Jira issue tracker (alternative to Linear). Set JIRA_HOST, JIRA_EMAIL, JIRA_API_TOKEN. See mcp-configs/project/jira.json

_notion_example._description: Notion documentation. Set NOTION_TOKEN. See mcp-configs/project/notion.json

_confluence_example._description: Confluence docs (alternative to Notion). Set CONFLUENCE_HOST, CONFLUENCE_EMAIL, CONFLUENCE_API_TOKEN. See mcp-configs/project/confluence.json

_postgres_example._description: PostgreSQL database. Set DATABASE_URL to PostgreSQL connection string. RECOMMEND read-only credentials. See mcp-configs/project/postgres.json

_mongodb_example._description: MongoDB database. Set MONGODB_URI. See mcp-configs/project/mongodb.json

_slack_example._description: Slack integration. Set SLACK_BOT_TOKEN and SLACK_TEAM_ID. See mcp-configs/project/slack.json

_vault_example._description: HashiCorp Vault for secrets management. Set VAULT_ADDR and VAULT_TOKEN. STRONGLY RECOMMENDED: use read-only token. See mcp-configs/project/vault.json

_sentry_example._description: Sentry error monitoring. Set SENTRY_AUTH_TOKEN and SENTRY_ORG. See mcp-configs/project/sentry.json

_grafana_example._description: Grafana observability dashboards. Set GRAFANA_URL and GRAFANA_API_KEY. Read-only API key recommended. See mcp-configs/project/grafana.json

_kubernetes_example._description: Kubernetes cluster access. Uses current kubeconfig context. STRONGLY RECOMMENDED: use read-only RBAC service account. See mcp-configs/project/kubernetes.json

_openapi_example._description: OpenAPI/AsyncAPI spec tools. Validates, lints, and generates code from specs. See mcp-configs/project/openapi.json
